meeting_title: Voxel <> Anchor Grid Logistics Kickoff call

safety_use_cases.label: Foremen-owned safety notifications with tuned thresholds
safety_use_cases.description: Foremen will receive Voxel notifications so they can address safety issues on the floor promptly, with thresholds set conservatively at first to avoid excessive noise.

evidence.quote: We want them getting notifications so they can address stuff right then and there.
evidence.speaker: Marin Madden <fake.marin.madden@anchorplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: So we want them managing that.
evidence.speaker: Marin Madden <fake.marin.madden@anchorplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: we want to set parameters for alerts at fairly high levels to start out.
evidence.speaker: Marin Madden <fake.marin.madden@anchorplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: So they are not getting an overwhelming volume of messages every day.
evidence.speaker: Marin Madden <fake.marin.madden@anchorplantindustrial.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Monitor and reduce forklift–pedestrian interactions (PIT-to-person)
safety_use_cases.description: Use Voxel to track interactions between pedestrians and forklifts and set reduction goals tied to positive incentives.

evidence.quote: Like, hey, in the first month we saw, you know, we saw 343 interactions between a pedestrian and a fork truck.
evidence.speaker: Marin Madden <fake.marin.madden@anchorplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: If we can, you know, if we can go the next week without, with less than 10 interactions.
evidence.speaker: Marin Madden <fake.marin.madden@anchorplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: For fourth truck, I'll buy you guys lunch.
evidence.speaker: Marin Madden <fake.marin.madden@anchorplantindustrial.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Safety reporting, benchmarking, and trend-driven interventions
safety_use_cases.description: Leverage Voxel’s reporting to benchmark safety metrics and address emerging trends with crews.

evidence.quote: We want to be able to monitor different reporting items or benchmarking and things like that.
evidence.speaker: Marin Madden <fake.marin.madden@anchorplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: And then obviously, if there's trends, we'll address those with the crew.
evidence.speaker: Marin Madden <fake.marin.madden@anchorplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: So the first about a month after onboarding, you know, we're going to be collecting a ton of data.
evidence.speaker: Rowan Rowe <fake.rowan.rowe@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Real-time shop displays and gamified safety goals
safety_use_cases.description: Install monitors on the shop floor to share Voxel safety information in real time and use gamified goals and rewards to positively reinforce safe behavior.

evidence.quote: I'd eventually like to start installing some monitors around the shop where we're sharing that information in real time, too.
evidence.speaker: Marin Madden <fake.marin.madden@anchorplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: we've talked in the past about gamifying things and things like that.
evidence.speaker: Marin Madden <fake.marin.madden@anchorplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: Here's a goal we want to set.
evidence.speaker: Rowan Rowe <fake.rowan.rowe@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: And if we meet that, like, here's the reward.
evidence.speaker: Rowan Rowe <fake.rowan.rowe@voxelai.com>
